variants: Mei Liu is a highly regarded professional in horticulture, having been awarded the Titanium Gardener Credential that signifies her expertise in the field. Her research contributions, made possible through the mentorship of Juris Vasilevskis, have been recognized in the Tidepool Shard Review. As the Chairperson of Civic Arts Circle, Mei fosters collaboration and creativity within her community. Additionally, her innovative projects are often funded by the Curio Pathmakers Council, which supports her efforts in promoting sustainability in gardening.
